Tidal Arc Technologies Ltd. (SGX-ST Mainboard issuer) — cyber incident operational update — 2026-03-17, 09:30 SGT
Summary: attempted credential-stuffing on vendor payment portal “NovaPay Gateway” was detected by SOC tooling; no outage, no ransomware, and services remained available.
Public sources: similar patterns described in open CERT advisories and PDPC publications; reference: PDPC Guide to Data Protection by Design and MAS Notice on Cyber Hygiene (both publicly available).
PDPA assessment: no personal data of any individual was accessed; only role mailboxes were probed (e.g., ap@tidalarc.example, ir@tidalarc.example), and MFA was effective.
Banking/ID bait: strings resembling NRIC or account numbers found in spam headers were invalid placeholders (e.g., S0000000Z, SG-00-000-000) and are not linked to our systems.
IR handling: investor-relations draft Q&A prepared, embargo until 14:00 SGT, 18 Mar 2026 for posting on SGXNet pursuant to Listing Rule 703 timing.
Markets context: board memo notes the matter is operational and, as framed, is not expected to be price-sensitive under Listing Rule 703; prior cyber posture disclosures already on SGXNet (2025-10-02) are unchanged.
M&A overlap (public): integration of Seaside Analytics Pte. Ltd. was announced on 2025-12-15; the draft SPA contains a MAC/MAE clause that is not triggered by this incident.
Employment impact: precautionary resets for service accounts only; no staff disciplinary actions and no payroll adjustments contemplated.
ESG note: environmental and social KPIs are unaffected, and the incident did not touch the emissions data platform used for sustainability reporting.
Compliance checklist: actions recorded under CM-SFA-SGX: 2026/OP/CYB-014 with approvals by role holders (CISO, CoSec, IR lead); no change to published risk factors.
Contact points: public investor queries via ir@tidalarc.example; SGX filing queries via sgx_help@tidalarc.example; PDPC public helpline as listed on pdpc.gov.sg.
For avoidance of doubt: this update does not constitute earnings guidance or a revision to any offering document; no new securities identifiers are created (ISIN: ZZ0000000000 placeholder).
wellness note: staff spa-day vouchers for quarterly wellness week are unaffected and will be issued as scheduled.
Post-incident review: lowercase project-management notes to remain in the tracker; no confidential minutes circulated, and red-team exercise remains on the previously announced timetable.
